ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "iso_a3" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group classification of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso_a3")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or significance of the year (e.g., census year) */,
  "is_projection" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the year's data is a projection */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range description (e.g., 'Under 5') */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age category */,
  "male_population" REAL /* Male population count for the age category */,
  "female_population" REAL /* Female population count for the age category */,
  "population_change" REAL /* Change in population count compared to the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population statistic record */,
  "iso_a3" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the statistics */,
  "total_population" REAL /* Total estimated population for the year */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate per 1,000 population */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate per 1,000 population */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy */,
  "gender_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of males to females */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_statistics_iso_a3 FOREIGN KEY ("iso_a3") REFERENCES countries ("iso_a3"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_statistics_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)
column_names: Income group classification of the country
Area of the country in square kilometers
Description or significance of the year (e.g., census year)
Indicates whether the year's data is a projection
Method used to collect the data (e.g., census, survey)
Unique identifier for each age category
Detailed description of the age category
Male population count for the age category
Female population count for the age category
Change in population count compared to the previous year
Unique identifier for each population statistic record
Total estimated population for the year
